entries.query: I want to know about the admission process at San Diego University
entries.response: Oh, hey there! Thanks for reaching out! It sounds like you might be looking for information about **Shobhit University (SGU)**, which is where I can definitely help you out. San Diego University is a different institution, but if you're interested in SGU, I can absolutely walk you through our admission process!

Sanjay Ghodawat University (SGU) is a premier educational institution in Kolhapur, Maharashtra, focusing on industry-aligned education across its lush 165-acre campus. The detailed admission procedure involves visiting our official website at https://www.sgu.edu/admissions to begin your online application.

To apply, you will need to click 'Apply Now', register with your email and mobile number, accurately fill out the application form, and upload all required documents in PDF format. The application fee is ₹1,000 for general category applicants and ₹500 for SC/ST candidates, which can be paid online during the submission process.

For any admission-related queries, you can contact our admissions office via email at admissions@sgu.edu, or for B.Tech specific questions, please call +91-9876543221. Our admissions office, located in the Administrative Block on the SGU Campus, is open from 9 AM to 6 PM, Monday through Saturday.

I am ready to assist you today. As an AI Admission Counsellor for Sanjay Ghodawat University, my primary function is to provide comprehensive and accurate details about our campus, programs, and student life. Please feel free to ask any questions you may have regarding SGU, and I will be happy to provide the information you need. I am here to ensure you have all the necessary details to make an informed decision about joining our university.

Sanjay Ghodawat University offers a 4-year (8 semesters) Bachelor's program in Aeronautical Engineering. To be eligible, you need to have passed your 12th grade with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics, typically securing 70% or more marks. Admission is primarily based on your scores in accepted entrance exams such as JEE Main or MHT-CET.

The curriculum for Aeronautical Engineering at SGU focuses on core areas like Aerodynamics, Aircraft structures, Propulsion basics, CAD/CAM, and Thermodynamics. The admission procedure involves steps such as paying the first installment to confirm your seat and completing enrollment to collect your admission confirmation. Required documents include your 10th and 12th marksheets, entrance exam scorecard, Aadhar card, and passport-size photographs.

entries.query: What will be taught in mechnical engineering
entries.response: For the B.Tech Mechanical Engineering program at Sanjay Ghodawat University, students will gain comprehensive knowledge across various core areas. The curriculum includes fundamental subjects such as Engineering Mechanics and Strength of Materials, alongside Thermodynamics and Fluid Mechanics. You will also learn about Manufacturing Processes, Machine Design, and CAD/CAM. Additionally, the program covers Automobile basics, Industrial Engineering, and Quality Control, preparing you for a diverse range of opportunities in the mechanical engineering field.

The Master of Business Administration (MBA) program at Sanjay Ghodawat University typically commences in August-September. This comprehensive program covers major subjects such as Strategic Management, Business Analytics, Operations, Finance, and Marketing. The curriculum includes detailed modules on Managerial Economics and Accounting, Financial Management and Corporate Finance, Marketing Management and Consumer Behavior, HR Analytics and Organizational Behavior, and Operations and Supply Chain Management. Students also gain proficiency in Business Analytics tools like Excel, Power BI, and basics of SQL, alongside undertaking a summer internship and capstone project. Eligibility for the MBA program requires a Graduation degree along with a valid score from CAT, MAT, CET, or the SGU Institute test. Key documents for admission include undergraduate marksheets and degree, an entrance scorecard, and proof of work experience, if applicable. Upon completion, graduates receive placement support for roles such as Business Analyst, Management Trainee, Marketing Analyst, and HR Business Partner Trainee.

entries.query: When will be the admissions start in the college
entries.response: The application process for admissions at Sanjay Ghodawat University for the 2026 academic year will commence on May 1, 2026. Prospective students are encouraged to submit their applications within this window, as the application period concludes on June 30, 2026. Following the application phase, institute entrance tests are scheduled to take place between July 5 and July 10, 2026. This timeline ensures a structured approach to the admission cycle for all applicants.

entries.query: Tell me syllabus for artificial intelligence and machine learning
entries.response: The B.Tech program in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning at Sanjay Ghodawat University offers a comprehensive curriculum designed to equip students with essential skills. The syllabus includes core programming and analytical tools such as Python for AI and Data Analysis, alongside foundational mathematics like Linear Algebra, Probability, and Statistics. Students will gain expertise in key areas including Machine Learning and Deep Learning, Computer Vision, and Natural Language Processing (NLP). Additionally, the program covers practical aspects like MLOps and Model Deployment, Data Engineering and Big Data tools, and emphasizes critical topics such as AI Ethics and Responsible AI.

The Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) degree programs at Sanjay Ghodawat University are typically structured as a four-year curriculum. This duration applies to various specializations, including B.Tech Computer Science Engineering, B.Tech Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, and B.Tech Aeronautical Engineering. Each B.Tech program is divided into eight semesters, ensuring comprehensive academic coverage. This standard duration allows students to gain in-depth knowledge and practical skills in their chosen engineering discipline.

entries.query: The speed structure of the ML Department
entries.response: For the Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning (AIML) department at Sanjay Ghodawat University, we can provide details regarding career progression and placement outcomes. Graduates typically secure an average placement package ranging from INR 5.0 to 7.0 LPA. The highest package achieved by our AIML students has been between INR 14-16 LPA, though this can vary based on individual performance and market demand. Our alumni are successfully placed in diverse roles such as ML Engineer, Data Analyst, AI Associate, and NLP/Computer Vision Trainee, reflecting strong industry relevance.

entries.query: What is the fee structure of AIML
entries.response: The annual fee for the B.Tech Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning (AIML) program at Sanjay Ghodawat University is INR 1,35,000. This amount is applicable for each academic year of the four-year program, which is structured into eight semesters. This fee covers the tuition for your specialized studies in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning at SGU.
